title: Altermons [Cobblemon]
description: A datapack / resource pack that adds new pokemon variants to the game.
body:
This modpack adds new variant versions of pokemon.
They can be determined as their forms are "Alterform - TYPING" such as "Beedrill (Alterform - Fire)" when you look at their name.

Alterforms receive changes to their stats, move pools and their abilities.

Some pokemon may receive coloration additions without form changes. I'd like to add a basalt Onix, etc.

## To Use: 
Put the mod in your datapack folder (server / client) and your resource pack folder (client).

## INFO:
To get info on the altermons go to my site: [Info for Altermons](https://dessence.dev/mods/altermons_info/)

## Added:
- Fire Beedrill (give kakuna a firestone, or find in sandy biomes).
<details>
<summary>Shiny</summary>
Shiny color is purple
</details>


- Dark / Ghost Gastly line (spawns in the same places are regular gastly.)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Shiny color is white.
</details>
- Steel / Water Kabutops (spawns same place as regular kabuto/ps but is rare instead of ultra-rare.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Shiny color is blue.
</details>
## Up Next:



## Possible Additions:
- Ghost Murkrow
- Poison Murkrow
- Ice Charmander
- Ghost Magikarp


# Known Incompatibilities
- TDMons (a Gastly Line Ported) - This will make gengar not appear in his darker texture. Everything else should work.
- ?? - Kakuna will not be able to be given a fire stone to evolve into fire beedrill. (Works in pure cobblemon).
